message:
test(core): add conformance oracle s78 — 20 probe tests for SQL semantics coverage

Targeted probes covering: CHECK constraints, nested CASE+NULL in aggregates,
multi-level LEFT JOIN NULL propagation, correlated UPDATE SET, DELETE NOT EXISTS,
LIMIT/OFFSET expressions, nested aggregate derived tables, CAST edge cases,
string functions, INSERT DEFAULT+RETURNING, window complex frames, LIKE/ESCAPE,
arithmetic, triggers+FK, complex WHERE+subqueries, GROUP_CONCAT DISTINCT,
REPLACE triggers, multi-CTE cross-references, HAVING with aggregates,
INSERT...SELECT with transforms. All 20 pass oracle comparison.

bd-3svps — conformance coverage expansion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
